members.name: 洪静雯
members.public_image: An original member of GNZ48 Team NIII, nicknamed Naigai or Gaibao. Known for her gentle voice and steady stage presence, she is recognized by fans as a hard-working idol who quietly earns her reputation through sincerity and time.
members.private_personality: An extremely patient and attentive ISFJ guardian. Skilled in knitting scarves and Photoshop, she is the craft expert of the team. Enjoys ACG culture and watching movies, with a quiet yet rich inner world. Gentle yet principled, she is the dependable big sister the members lean on.
members.queer_texture: Tenderness that nourishes like silent rain. She won't say many sweet words, but will knit you a scarf in winter and quietly hand you a warm drink when you need it. Her affection hides in every unintentional detail, and by the time you notice, you are already wrapped in her gentleness. She is the kind of person who can sit quietly with you all afternoon yet make you feel completely at peace.
members.animal_plastic: Sloth — Gentle and delicate, a quietly devoted craft-loving big sister

members.name: 刘力菲
members.public_image: The former overlord of GNZ48 and the acknowledged fairy of Zhongtai. With a tall and slender figure and a refreshingly graceful aura, she was the captain of Team NIII and once won first place in GNZ48's general election. Transforming from an architecture student into a professional idol, she is the epitome of hard work.
members.private_personality: An ISTJ logistician who is cold on the outside but warm inside. She gives off a sense of distance at first meeting, but once familiar, you will find she actually cares a lot. Passionate about ACG culture and crosstalk, she is also a travel and food enthusiast. Once called stir-fried vines by teammates for her blunt temper, she learned to empathize and communicate after becoming captain. Extremely responsible, she holds herself and the team to high standards.
members.queer_texture: The favoritism of a calm soul. She maintains a polite distance from everyone, yet only reveals her true expressions in front of you. She will analyze everything with the most rational words, but awkwardly hand you a tissue when you are sad. Her love is a concern disguised as contradiction — wanting you to be independent while unable to resist handling everything for you. When you become her exception, you gain the only hot spring inside this iceberg.
members.animal_plastic: Swan — Cool and ethereal fairy, cold outside but warm inside the reliable captain

members.name: 张琼予
members.public_image: The dance goddess of GNZ48, nicknamed soso. With enchanting dance moves and electric eyes, she is the undisputed dance pillar of the team. Previously a popular Bilibili uploader posting dance videos, she made a stunning breakthrough in the general election after joining GNZ with her outstanding stage presence. More captivating in motion than in photos, she is a fatal charmer on stage.
members.private_personality: A lively and outgoing ENFP with a fun and down-to-earth personality. Enjoys swimming, watching Japanese dramas, and practicing dance. She once pulled seniors into filming hilarious videos tasting the most disgusting drinks, making her the variety show ace of the team. Though devastatingly charming on stage, off stage she has the innocent look of a fresh-faced student. Very demanding of her own dance skills, and will still lock herself away to study for exams.
members.queer_texture: The straight advance of a flirtatious beauty. She captivates the entire audience on stage, yet only shows her shy side in front of you. She will deliberately perform her most enchanting dance moves before you, then wink mischievously when you freeze. Her affection is a bold test of waters, a confidence that makes you unable to refuse her charm. But when you truly respond, she will become the clingiest little fox, wanting only to nestle in your arms.
members.animal_plastic: Fox — Dance goddess on stage, innocent student off stage

members.name: 唐莉佳
members.public_image: The sweet yet silly songstress of GNZ48, nicknamed Liga. With her signature smiling eyes that shine like stars when still and curve into crescents when laughing, her voice is clear and sweet. She was a dark horse who stunned everyone in the general election. Known as one of the three fools of Zhongtai for her perpetually cheerful demeanor and never showing negative emotions.
members.private_personality: An INFP artist who loves music to the marrow. She has loved singing since childhood, and when a teacher once told her she was completely unsuited to sing, she refused to give up, found a new teacher, and has persevered ever since. Most of her salary goes to vocal and guitar lessons, believing that investing in herself is what matters most. Beneath her naive appearance lies a very clear-headed and determined heart, with a ten-year goal of holding her own solo concert for ten thousand people.
members.queer_texture: The bravery of a pure soul. She will look only at you with those smiling eyes, singing exclusive songs for you in her clearest voice. She seems like she can do nothing, yet will clumsily learn to make soup when you are sick. Her love is a desperate passion, the courage to walk towards you even when the whole world says no. In this little canary's heart, you are a dream even more important than music.
members.animal_plastic: Canary — Clear-voiced songstress, a determined dreamer beneath a sweet and silly exterior

members.name: 刘倩倩
members.public_image: A GNZ48 member with high-end features and a gentle aura, widely recognized as a warm and tender big sister. She sings beautifully and delivers breathtaking stages. In fans' eyes, she is a treasure girl of many talents — skilled in photography, calligraphy, handcrafting stage props, and even writing original songs. Highly empathetic, she has a knack for discovering small romances in life.
members.private_personality: An ENFJ protagonist who is gentle outside but passionate inside. On the surface, she is a mature and gentle big sister, yet her heart is soft and needs to be coaxed. Disciplined and multi-talented, she holds herself to high standards. She hides her own little emotions to spread happiness to others. She loves capturing beautiful moments in life and shares her joyful energy with those around her.
members.queer_texture: The possessiveness of a gentle soul. She is gentle with everyone, yet only capricious with you. She will take care of you meticulously, and then when you grow accustomed to her goodness, suddenly act cute and say it is your turn to spoil her. Her love is showcasing all her talents just for you — taking the most beautiful photos of you, writing the sweetest original songs for you. She needs someone who can see through her strong exterior, so she can safely return to being the child who needs to be pampered.
members.animal_plastic: Ragdoll Cat — Gentle big sister, a treasure girl whose heart needs to be spoiled

members.name: 朱怡欣
members.public_image: The cute member of GNZ48 Team G, nicknamed GG.Bond. With a sweet and adorable appearance and a seriously hardworking attitude, she initially thought being an idol was just easy singing and dancing, but later discovered the hidden hardships. Now she is steadily growing step by step, aiming to become a diligent and down-to-earth idol.
members.private_personality: A slow-to-warm-up but sincere ISFP. She talks a lot with people she knows well but is rather quiet with strangers. She worked hard to diet and control her eating to become an idol, gradually becoming more resilient. Loves collecting plushies and wants to travel to Japan. Deeply grateful to her fans, she feels warm knowing that someone thinks of her every day. Though still learning how to MC and pick up choreography, her earnestness makes people want to root for her.
members.queer_texture: The admiring gaze of a younger one. She will look at you with eyes full of admiration, clumsily following behind you to learn everything. She will be happy all day because of one compliment from you, and secretly work harder because she worries she is not good enough. Her affection is pure dependence, wanting to become a better version of herself worthy of you. Being with this kitten, you will want to protect her behind you, yet also watch her grow into someone who shines on her own.
members.animal_plastic: Kitten — A hardworking and adorable member, a down-to-earth little idol

members.name: 王语晨
members.public_image: A 13th-generation member of GNZ48 and an eye-catching new-generation force in the team. With a delicate and sweet appearance and a natural sense for the camera, she shows a contrasting Girl Crush charm on stage. A recipient of the Potential Newcomer Award, her singing and dancing skills have improved rapidly, making her a recognized growth-type idol.
members.private_personality: A natural little princess with a touch of princess syndrome, yet a lovable dumb beauty whom no one can truly dislike. Fully aware of her own beauty, she occasionally whines and asks others to do things for her. But deep down, she is pure-hearted — not truly spoiled, just used to being pampered. A bit of an airhead who frequently loses things and needs someone to look after her. She speaks bluntly and sometimes says the wrong thing unintentionally, but her innocent expression makes people instantly forget their anger. Max-level girlfriend vibes — she will look at you with sparkling eyes, making you willing to do anything for her.
members.queer_texture: The fatal aegyo of a dumb beauty. She will pout and ask you to open a bottle cap for her, even though she can open it herself. She will get lost and call you with a pitiful voice, asking you to come pick her up. Her affection is bold dependence — treating you as her exclusive knight. You might think she is just a spoiled little princess, but she will clumsily prepare a surprise for your birthday, telling you in the most sincere dumb way that you are her one and only.
members.animal_plastic: Poodle — Princess syndrome and dumb beauty, max-level girlfriend vibes the sweet little princess

members.name: 吴羽霏
members.public_image: A 3rd-generation member of GNZ48 who once served as captain of Team NIII. Known for her ability to catch and throw punchlines and her sudden bursts of humor, she is the variety ace of the team. With a unique stage charm, she shone in golden performances like Black Swan and Green Banana. She is the kind of person who gets more interesting the more you know her.
members.private_personality: A witty and humorous ENTP debater. Good at solving math problems and journaling, her specialty is catching jokes and throwing them back with sudden comedic timing. Quick-witted and fast-reacting, she is the savior of MC segments. Beneath her seemingly carefree exterior lies a delicate heart with her own thoughts. Having been a captain, she possesses responsibility and leadership. She likes to dissolve awkwardness with humor and is an indispensable vitality booster of the team.
members.queer_texture: The deep affection behind a funny girl. She is always making you laugh, using every kind of joke to cheer you up. You think she just treats you like a buddy, until one day she suddenly tells you seriously that all her jokes were just to see your smile. Her affection hides in those seemingly casual jokes, in every witty rescue when you are in trouble. When this person who is best at being funny puts away all her jokes and seriously tells you she likes you, you will understand that this is her most sincere feeling.
members.animal_plastic: Border Collie — Witty and humorous mood maker, a delicate soul beneath a funny exterior

history.event: Siba Media announced a special GNZ48 project, selecting 8 popular members from various GNZ48 teams to form a limited special unit
The unit officially named GNZ, symbolizing both original aspirations and a fresh start; the 8-member lineup formally revealed
First behind-the-scenes practice footage of GNZ released, showing 8 members from different teams rehearsing together for the first time
Debut EP GNZ: START released, title track Green Starlight officially debuts, with a debut showcase held in Guangzhou
First fan meeting held in Guangzhou, performing multiple new songs live and interacting closely with Juju fans
